title: Neptune Welcomes the Crew
description: On pages 2–5, this part follows Unknown person #1, Sanji, Fish-Man Island Citizens, King Neptune, Narrator, Fukaboshi, Shirahoshi. The core story beat is neptune welcomes the crew.
scene: The scene centers on neptune welcomes the crew, with Unknown person #1, Sanji, Fish-Man Island Citizens, King Neptune, Narrator, Fukaboshi, Shirahoshi driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A few hours ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's so tightly sealed...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What on earth could be inside...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it was treasure, surely it would be in a chest? Since it's a barrel... perhaps some expensive liquor?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's so... tight...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right,...that's enough...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Keehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe heh!! No need to open it any further, that's Moore than enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What.....?! is there... a person inside?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Snap snap snap

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaah Hihihh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Thanks so much, ladies!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaah!!! hahhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't try running away, NOW!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quickly! to the water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ohhhh no, you don't!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's too late for you girls!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: KehiHih!!! I really appreciate your help, little mermaids!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: I'm... sinking...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, yes... and what a swamp! There's no escape from these bottom- less depths!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a fruit user, you see... I ate the Numa Numa No mi and became a swamp man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Struggle all you like... it'll only make you sink deeper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SeboMANne, who has been the same, and

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, and don't think about screaming! It ain't like I'm gonna kill ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: some- body...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did I just tell ya.....?!! I said it, didn't I?!!! ya little fooool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IShiri III!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't worry... I'm just gonna put you girls to sleep for a while...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: unhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kehihi hihi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hahahaha Haha!This body of millline is a bottomless expansive! N

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Now, let's see... How much are mermaids going for these days?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: If I remember right... they auction for around 70 million each... so with three of 'em... kehihhi!! I've got a lot to thank those straw hats for!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Thanks to them, I've made it all the way onto fishman Island without even passing through any inspections!! I can hunt down all themermaids I like!! Now this is what I call a treasure: Island!!! Kethhhhh!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The straw hat pirates?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... I'm not saying they did it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I mean... they were such nice people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And besides, they are Caimie's friends...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They could have been threatening her...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At any rate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The fact of the matter is that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only people who were in the vicinity at the time of the incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...and the straw hat pirates...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: All humans have motive enough to Kidnap a mermaid!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Amongst humans, young marmaids can be sold for extremely large quantities of money!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even so, it doesn't seem fair to assume...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how many pirates have put on a friendly act to get close to mermaids in the past, only to kidnap the poor girls and make their escape?!!!

summary: Neptune Welcomes the Crew. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
